---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new behavior, integration, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What you'd like**
A clear description of the feature or behavior.

**Why**
The use case or problem it solves.

**Layer it touches**
- [ ] protocol / driver (BLE)
- [ ] robot API / watchdog
- [ ] LLM agent / personas / MCP
- [ ] perception addon (vision / detect / voice / monitor)
- [ ] examples / docs

**Additional context**
Anything else — links, sketches, related robots.
